creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #5)

> … an error in response to: 
> 
> /usr/local/share/wine/pkg32.sh upgrade

I guess, the same type of workaround as in comment #0: 


/usr/local/share/wine/pkg32.sh upgrade -r FreeBSD


(Works for me with poudriere in the mix, I imagine it working equally well with PkgBase in the mix.)
